Commercial Stucco in Caldwell County, TX

Caldwell County's commercial landscape is evolving as Lockhart's barbecue-fueled tourism grows and new development follows the Highway 130 toll corridor. Star Stucco of Austin provides commercial stucco services to businesses throughout Lockhart, Luling, and the surrounding communities.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Serving Caldwell County's Growing Commercial Sector

Lockhart has earned a national reputation as the barbecue capital of Texas, and the tourism, retail, and hospitality development following that recognition has created new demand for commercial exterior services. Storefronts around the courthouse square, restaurants along Highway 183, and new retail buildings near Highway 130 all need stucco that reflects the quality these businesses deliver.

Luling and the southern portions of Caldwell County add agricultural industry, oil-field services, and small-town retail to the commercial mix. These properties need durable stucco that handles industrial use patterns, heavy truck traffic near loading areas, and the general wear that comes with rural commercial operations.

Caldwell County's Blackland Prairie soils are heavy clay that swells with moisture and shrinks during dry spells, creating ground movement that stresses building foundations and exterior walls. We account for this by using flexible stucco systems and strategic control joint placement that absorbs minor substrate movement without visible cracking.

What's Included With Our Commercial Stucco in Caldwell County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Site Assessment

We inspect the building, evaluate soil and drainage conditions, and assess the existing wall system at your Caldwell County commercial property.

Project Planning & Scheduling

Our project timeline considers your business hours, tenant needs, and the seasonal weather patterns typical of the Blackland Prairie region.

Surface Preparation

Walls are cleaned, cracks routed, and bonding agents applied to create a prepared surface that supports a long-lasting stucco system.

Commercial-Grade Application

We use commercial stucco mixes and application techniques designed for the substrate types and soil conditions common in Caldwell County construction.

Finish Coat & Detailing

The final finish is applied to your specifications, with careful attention to color, texture, and transitions at windows, doors, and trim elements.

Final Inspection & Warranty

We walk the completed project with you and provide warranty documentation before final invoicing.

Common Commercial Stucco Needs in Caldwell County

Caldwell County's mix of tourism, agriculture, and suburban growth creates a range of commercial stucco needs. These are the projects we handle most often.

New Construction Exteriors

New commercial buildings near the Highway 130 interchange and along Highway 183 in Lockhart need stucco exteriors that are built correctly for the local soil and climate conditions.

Storefront Renovation

Historic storefronts around the Lockhart courthouse square and along Main Street are being refreshed with stucco that modernizes the exterior while respecting the town's character.

Multifamily Buildings

New apartment developments in Lockhart and along the Highway 130 corridor need durable stucco for workforce housing serving the expanding job market in the area.

Office Park Stucco

Small professional offices in Lockhart and Luling maintain credibility with well-kept stucco exteriors that project stability and professionalism.

Retail Center Restoration

Shopping areas along Highway 183 and in Luling benefit from stucco restoration that addresses weather damage and refreshes the property's appearance for tenants and shoppers.

HOA Common Areas

New residential developments in Caldwell County maintain community buildings, entry walls, and amenity centers with stucco finishes that match the neighborhood design standards.

Why Choose Us for Commercial Stucco in Caldwell County?

  • Familiarity with the clay soil conditions and foundation movement patterns common across Caldwell County
  • Full commercial insurance and bonding for projects in Lockhart, Luling, and surrounding areas
  • Scheduling that minimizes disruption to restaurant, retail, and tourism operations in downtown Lockhart
  • Experience working on both historic commercial facades and modern new construction
  • Knowledge of Caldwell County and City of Lockhart permitting and code requirements
  • Flexible stucco systems that accommodate the ground movement caused by expansive clay soils

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Caldwell County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Commercial Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule a Commercial Consultation

Call us to set up a visit to your Caldwell County property. We will walk the site together and talk through your priorities and budget.

2

Site Inspection & Scope

Our team inspects the building, measures wall areas, and notes soil and drainage conditions that affect the stucco system design.

3

Detailed Bid & Timeline

You receive a clear proposal with itemized costs, material information, and a project schedule that respects your business operations.

4

Professional Execution

We deliver the project on time, keep the job site clean, and complete a final review to confirm everything meets the agreed specifications.
